# k-gov-skill

한국 공무원을 위한 행정업무 AI 스킬 모음집입니다.

## Purpose

This repository helps AI coding/agent tools use Korean public-sector workflows: public data portal APIs, Korean law search, official gazette search, National Assembly materials, HWP/HWPX document handling, and organization/quota review packets.

## Start here

- README.md — human overview
- docs/getting-started.md — first run guide
- docs/auth-model.md — API key and login model
- examples/skill-catalog.json — machine-readable skill catalog
- examples/index.json — machine-readable runnable examples index
- skills/public-data-portal/README.md — first runnable public data skill

## Core commands

```bash
npm run example:public-data
node scripts/list-skills.mjs
npm run check
```

## Safety

Do not assume public API keys are bundled. For data.go.kr and similar APIs, users usually need to apply for their own key. If a key is missing, guide the user to the application path and provide sample/fallback output.

Do not upload private government documents to external services. Preserve official source, date, and institution in outputs.
